settings.heading: Inside AURARING
settings.subheading: Clinical-grade sensor technology, miniaturized into a seamless titanium form factor.

settings.content: We didn't just build a health tracker; we built a laboratory for your finger. By monitoring arterial pulse from the base of your finger, AURARING captures a signal 10x stronger than wrist-based wearables.

settings.heading: Precision Engineering
settings.subheading: The most advanced sensors ever integrated into a ring.
settings.text_1: Medical-grade heart rate and HRV monitoring with 99% accuracy.
settings.text_2: Detect subtle changes in body temperature to predict recovery and illness.
settings.text_3: Intelligent activity detection that stays out of your way.
settings.text_4: Advanced SpO2 sensing for night-time breathing analysis.
settings.text_5: Sophisticated algorithms that calculate your daily readiness score.
settings.text_6: Efficiency-first design that lasts a full week on one charge.

settings.heading: Aerospace Grade
settings.text: Crafted from brushed Grade 5 titanium. It’s lighter than a wedding band but tougher than steel.

settings.heading: Waterproof Focus
settings.text: Engineered to endure. Water-resistant up to 100 meters, so you never have to take it off.

settings.heading: The future is at your fingertips.
settings.text: Experience the most advanced wearable technology ever engineered.
